name: Amagasa Co., Ltd.
summary: Amagasa Co., Ltd. plans, develops, wholesales, and retails non-leather women's footwear in Japan. The company offers its products primarily under the JELLY BEANS brand. It also imports and exports women's shoes. Amagasa Co., Ltd. sells its products to specialty shoe stores, department stores, and apparel customers. It also operates online shops. The company was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
